## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Clerk and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and collaboration process.](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has created initial artifacts (company context, audience personas, writing guidelines) for Clerk's content generation](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Clerk is looking to expand content strategy both horizontally and vertically, including more top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [GrowthX will build out topic clusters, create a content calendar in Airtable, and produce a sample blog post for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [Collaboration process for content creation and publishing needs to be refined, considering Clerk's lack of CMS](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Artifacts and Content Generation Process

  - [GrowthX created three initial artifacts: company context, audience personas, and writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Artifacts influence content generation from brief to final draft in Atlas platform](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
  - [Company context and audience personas applied at beginning, writing guidelines at article draft stage](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Research step uses Perplexity API to gather topic information, ensuring detailed content](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)

### Clerk's Content Strategy Goals

  - [Position Clerk as the developer-first user management platform](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [Rank for high-intent queries while expanding top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [Target emerging opportunities in AI and coding-related keywords](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Explore build vs. buy decision content and potential competitor comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)

### Content Improvement Areas

  - [Inject more human tone, empathy, and conversational text into content](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=2341.0)
  - [Implement regular content refresh cadence](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=2237.0)
  - [Explore different approaches to blog post imagery beyond templated hero images](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=2069.0)
  - [Improve CTAs within blog posts (currently limited to upper corner and footer)](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)

### Technical Collaboration

  - [Clerk to provide access to Google Search Console, GA4, Discord support database](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
  - [GrowthX to review Clerk's content backlog in Notion and Scrunch keyword tracking](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=1929.0)
  - [Potential collaboration between GrowthX and Clerk's in-house design team for blog imagery](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=2137.0)

### Next Steps in Collaboration

  - [GrowthX to finalize topic clusters and create content calendar in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [Produce sample blog post for Clerk's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [Refine collaboration process for Phase 2, including content generation, editing, and publishing workflow](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Clerk to provide access to Google Search Console, GA4, and Discord support database](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
  - [GrowthX to review Clerk's content backlog and Scrunch keyword tracking](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=1929.0)
  - [Finalize topic clusters and create content calendar in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [GrowthX to produce sample blog post for Clerk's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [Refine collaboration process for content creation and publishing in Phase 2](https://fathom.video/share/mExpFHZCbTwjauEkEeZyuuj7sYbrX2b5?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
